candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line, but it is not identified as related to cost of sales/goods for resale. The selected COGS bucket is only 'Goods for resale', and the statement does not show a COGS-specific D&A line.
D&A component line, but not labelled as COGS/cost of sales related. Likely part of the broader D&A disclosure rather than a separate COGS-specific amount.
Component of D&A, but not tied to COGS and likely subordinate to the broader D&A presentation.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row is labelled as belonging to cost of sales or goods for resale. To avoid misallocating broad operating D&A to COGS, no separate COGS_DA row is selected.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: This is the clearest separate operating D&A summary line above EBIT. The selected XSGA bucket consists of operating overhead component rows and explicitly excluded D&A, so this same-level D&A line appears outside those selected rows and should be added separately. It is preferred over more granular D&A component rows to avoid double counting.
Looks like a component beneath the broader D&A disclosure, so it should not be selected when the summary D&A row is available.
Also appears to be a component of the broader D&A disclosure and should not be selected separately when the summary row exists.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows are overhead components and do not include D&A. A separate operating D&A summary row is presented at the same level above EBIT, so it should be added separately. The summary row is chosen instead of component rows to avoid double counting.
